name: gauntlet-lite
description: Sensor-free Gauntlet orchestration for product, implementation, review, and release work.

interface.longDescription: Shape, accept, implement, review, verify, land, and ship product and engineering work with proportional direct proof.
defaultPrompt: Shape this feature and identify the first useful build step.
Implement this accepted change and prove the result.
Audit this workflow and prioritize the material findings.
